title: Formspec Respondent Ledger Event
description: A single append-only respondent-side audit event for the optional Respondent Ledger add-on. Events capture material draft, submission, amendment, attachment, prepopulation, and validation milestones without redefining a Formspec Response as an event stream.

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this event within the ledger.

sequence.description: Monotonic sequence number within the ledger.

occurredAt.description: When the underlying material action occurred.

recordedAt.description: When the processor durably recorded the event.

responseId.description: Identifier of the Formspec Response this event belongs to.

definitionUrl.description: Canonical URL of the pinned Definition in force for this event.

definitionVersion.description: Exact pinned Definition version in force for this event.

changes.description: Ordered set of atomic material changes associated with this event.

sessionRef.description: Implementation-specific identifier for the respondent session segment associated with the event.

amendmentRef.description: Identifier for the amendment cycle this event belongs to, when applicable.

EventType.description: Canonical event classifications defined by the Respondent Ledger add-on. The first thirteen values are required event types; the remaining values are optional but standardized extension points.

kind.description: Who initiated or is attributed with the event.

display.description: Human-readable actor label for timeline and support views.

assuranceLevel.description: Authentication or identity assurance tier associated with the actor for this event.

identityProviderRef.description: Reference to the normalized identity provider, verifier, or adapter used for this actor context.

subjectRef.description: Stable pseudonymous subject or continuity identifier used by the ledger independent of any specific identity provider or proofing implementation.

kind.description: Capture channel or subsystem that produced the event.

deviceId.description: Stable or session-local device identifier when tracked.

ipAddressRef.description: Protected derivative or reference for network address metadata.

userAgentRef.description: Protected derivative or reference for user-agent metadata.

op.description: Atomic operation represented by this material change entry.

path.description: Logical Formspec response path identifying the changed node.

valueClass.description: Origin class of the changed value.

itemKey.description: Stable Formspec item key when the path maps directly to one.

before.description: Prior value when retained under the implementation's privacy policy.

after.description: Resulting value when retained under the implementation's privacy policy.

displayBefore.description: Human-readable prior value summary safe for timeline display.

displayAfter.description: Human-readable resulting value summary safe for timeline display.

reasonCode.description: Machine-readable explanation for why the change happened.

dataPointer.description: Optional JSON Pointer or equivalent row discriminator for precise targeting in repeated structures.

provider.description: Provider or issuer identifier, such as idme, login.gov, an internal proofing service, or a DID issuer.

adapter.description: Implementation adapter/interface identifier used to normalize a provider-specific identity flow into the canonical ledger shape.

subjectRef.description: Stable pseudonymous subject or continuity identifier bound to this attestation without requiring disclosure of a real-world identity in the ledger itself.

verificationMethod.description: DID URL, key identifier, or equivalent verification-method reference used to validate the attestation.

credentialType.description: High-level credential or attestation category captured by the event.

credentialRef.description: Reference to an encrypted token, credential, presentation, or provider-response envelope rather than the raw secret itself.

personhoodCheck.description: Outcome of proof-of-personhood, liveness, or uniqueness checks when applicable.

subjectBinding.description: Which party in the workflow the attestation is about.

assuranceLevel.description: Assurance tier or policy profile satisfied by the attestation.

selectiveDisclosureProfile.description: Named policy profile controlling what portions of the attestation may be revealed in support, review, export, or dispute contexts.

evidenceRef.description: Reference to encrypted reveal material, redacted export evidence, or provider-response evidence.

PrivacyTier.description: Disclosure tier describing how linkable or revealed the subject identity is for the actor or attestation at this event boundary.

errors.description: Count of error-severity validation findings at the event boundary.

warnings.description: Count of warning-severity validation findings at the event boundary.

infos.description: Count of info-severity validation findings at the event boundary.

results.description: Optional detailed ValidationResult snapshot captured alongside the summary counts.

DidString.description: Decentralized identifier string in DID syntax.

HashString.description: Algorithm-prefixed digest or integrity token, such as 'sha256:...'.

Extensions.description: Implementation-specific extension data. Keys must be namespaced with an 'x-' prefix.
